description: The facilities operations team needs every hotel in demodb classified by maintenance priority before the Q1 inspection cycle. Using OrientDB Studio at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html (root / GymAnything123!), classify all 15 hotels in demodb by creating a HotelMaintenanceFlag vertex class with a unique index and linking each flag record to its corresponding hotel via a RequiresMaintenance edge. Assign CRITICAL, HIGH, or STANDARD priorities based on the Stars rating and accommodation Type of each hotel.
